description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a before_script that runs 'yarn global add codecov' and then 'yarn' to install project dependencies. Define a single stage called test and a job named test in that stage that executes the command 'yarn unit && codecov -t $CODECOV_TOKEN', referencing the CODECOV_TOKEN secret. No additional services, artifacts, or rules are required.
